member.name: T:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar
member.summary: A calendar to display date grid based content.
member.remarks: There are 2 additional attributes that can be used: column-class and table-class. They will apply CSS classes to the resulting elements as per their names.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.Months
member.summary: A collection of dates within the months to be displayed.
member.remarks: Each month should have only one day within it and can be any day in the month to display.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.StartOfWeek
member.summary: The first day of the week to display.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.RowHeight
member.summary: The default height of rows within the calendars in pixels.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.MonthFormat
member.summary: The date format string to apply to the month titles.
member.remarks: Set to null to hide the month titles.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.DayFormat
member.summary: The date format string to apply to day of the week titles.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.ShowAllDays
member.summary: Specifies whether to invoke for all days or only those within the current month.
member.remarks: Example: 2024-10-01 will be displayed on the 2024-09 calendar; when this value is true it will behave the same as other dates, when this value is false it will be an empty cell.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.PrintSinglePage
member.summary: Specifies whether to print each calendar month on its own page.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.Days
member.summary: Content to display for each day in the months.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.OnMonthTitleClicked
member.summary: An event callback that is invoked when the month title is clicked.
member.remarks: This callback is only invoked when is not null or whitespace and the user clicks the rendered month title. The payload is the first day of the month being displayed, as it appears in . When no delegate is assigned the month title is rendered as a non-interactive heading.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.OnWeekdayHeaderClicked
member.summary: An event callback that is invoked when a weekday header cell is clicked.
member.remarks: The payload is the specific date that represents that weekday column in the calendar header row, derived from the week starting on for the current month. When no delegate is assigned the weekday header cells are rendered as non-interactive table headings.

member.name: P:easy_blazor_bulma.Calendar.AdditionalAttributes
member.summary: Any additional attributes applied directly to the component.

member.summary: Automatically selects a the item whose display text is closest to the input when exiting the component.

member.name: F:easy_blazor_bulma.InputDurationOptions.DisplayDaysAsHours
member.summary: Will format values greater than 24 hours to show the total number of hours instead of days and hours. Also updates decimal values to parse as hours and minutes.

member.name: F:easy_blazor_bulma.InputDurationOptions.DisplayHoursAsMinutes
member.summary: Will format values greater than 60 minutes to show the total number of minutes instead of days, hours, and minutes. Also updates decimal values to parse as minutes and seconds.

member.name: F:easy_blazor_bulma.InputDurationOptions.DisplayMinutesAsSeconds
member.summary: Will format values greater than 60 seconds to show the total number of seconds instead of days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

member.name: F:easy_blazor_bulma.InputDurationOptions.ValidateTextInput
member.summary: Checks for common input errors when the text field is used.

member.name: F:easy_blazor_bulma.InputDurationOptions.ConvertDecimals
member.summary: Parses decimal values as minutes or seconds. The portion after the decimal will become a percentage of 60 minutes or 60 seconds based on the input string. Default parsing is days.hours:minutes:seconds.fractional.
